productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Tshirt
description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 93% cotton and 7% elastane, has a round neck with short sleeves and branding with sequins on the chest Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Designed for those who never compromise on style and comfort, this T-shirt from United Colours of Benetton is a great buy. The logo in crystal embellishments on the left chest adds to it a subtle fashion. Team it with skinny jeans and heeled, sleek sandals for that chic look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
